# NeoFont

NeoFont is the locked NeoApps / NeoGateway branding font.

## Source

The font was built from the locked Neo alphabet specimen image:

source/neo-alphabet-specimen.png

Do not replace, regenerate, redraw, or approximate the glyphs with another sci-fi font.

## Generated files

NeoFont.ttf
NeoFont.woff2

## Usage rule

NeoFont is opt-in only.

Do not apply NeoFont globally to:

- body text
- buttons
- tables
- forms
- normal navigation text
- regular UI copy

Use NeoFont only for approved branding/title spots, such as headers, page titles, and body section titles.

## Branding color rule

When spelling out a Neo app/node name:

NEO = light Neo silver #DDEBFF
app/node portion = established app/node primary color

Examples:

NEO + APPS
NEO + GATEWAY
NEO + MOTHERBRAIN
NEO + SEKTOR
NEO + ERMAC
NEO + SCORPION

Use split spans so NEO and the app/node name can be colored separately.
